coach_feedback:
- 4 of 5 unit tests fail with ValidationError at import time. The handler imports broker from app.py, which calls _create_app() at module level (line 100), which instantiates Settings() (line 34) requiring pg_dsn and embed_url. Unit tests cannot provide these without full infrastructure setup, violating test isolation.: Refactor app.py to defer Settings() instantiation until the lifespan context manager runs, not at module-load time. Options: (1) Use lazy initialization pattern, (2) Accept settings as a parameter to _create_app(), (3) Move broker creation inside the lifespan. This will allow unit tests to import the handler module without triggering full app initialization.
- BDD oracle executed zero scenarios (scenarios_passed=0, one pytest_runner_error finding the feature file). Check the pytest collection path configuration and verify the feature file exists at the expected location.
- Wiring analysis shows parse_degraded status for app.py, handler.py, and settings.py.
